Install and automate. Load the TDL in Tally in under two minutes and start working with expert support available 24/7.

Connected Banking

Seamless bank integrations.Run banking directly from Tally

Yes Bank Plugin

Make RTGS, NEFT and IMPS payments directly inside Tally.

Learn More →Know More ↗

Canara Bank Plugin

View balances and access statements seamlessly from Tally.

Learn More →Know More ↗

AU Bank Plugin

Enable real-time balance checks and auto-reconciliation.

Learn More →Know More ↗
